title: Step-3.7 Flash FULLY FREE Unlimited API + Hermes Agent: THIS IS ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: StepFun released Step 3.7 Flash, a high-efficiency language model designed for agentic coding, tool use, and multimodal understanding. The model is available free through Hermes Agent and shows strong performance on benchmarks like SWE-Bench Pro and Terminal-Bench.
